task.name: Implement abuse notification email dispatch
task.description: Add a function to the abuse-notification service that sends an email to the administrator within 2 minutes of an abuse flag.

completion_criteria.description: An abuse flag triggers an email sent to the configured administrator address

user_stories.action: review abuse reports and take action
user_stories.outcome: abuse-flagged URLs can be blocked or removed

acceptance_criteria.description: Administrator receives email within 2 minutes of abuse flag

responsibilities.description: Send email to administrator within 2 min of abuse flag
responsibilities.statement: Send email to administrator within 2 min of abuse flag

test_cases.expected_outcome: Administrator email is sent within 2 minutes of abuse flag creation

evaluation_criteria.evaluation_method: Trigger an abuse flag and measure the time-to-email delivery.
evaluation_criteria.success_condition: Administrator email received within 120 seconds of flag creation.

active_constraints.text: Observability: structured JSON logs to stdout; logs ingested by the platform's standard log aggregator.
